purpose.statement: Document constraints and non‑negotiables that shape what is possible, without proposing solutions or workarounds.
This artefact clarifies boundaries, not approaches.

template_block.name: policy-legal
template_block.title: Policy / legal
template_block.statement: List constraints arising from law, regulation, or formal policy.

template_block.name: accessibility-and-inclusion
template_block.title: Accessibility & inclusion
template_block.statement: List mandatory standards, obligations, or constraints.

template_block.name: security-and-privacy
template_block.title: Security & privacy
template_block.statement: List constraints relating to data handling, hosting, access, or assurance.

template_block.name: operational
template_block.title: Operational
template_block.statement: List constraints arising from staffing, capability, or organisational structure.

template_block.name: technical-data
template_block.title: Technical / data
template_block.statement: List constraints relating to legacy systems, data availability, or interoperability.

template_block.name: non-negotiables
template_block.title: Non‑negotiables
template_block.statement: Explicit statements of what must be true, regardless of approach.

template_block.name: known-tensions
template_block.title: Known tensions
template_block.statement: Where constraints conflict or create trade‑offs, describe them without resolving.

constraints.boundary: List areas where constraints may exist but are not yet confirmed.

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: constraints_integrity: description: > Constraint documents must describe boundaries, not propose solutions or optimisations. rule: Reject outputs that suggest how to work around constraints.
constraints_must_be_external_or_structural: description: Constraints must not be preferences or opinions. severity: error
non_negotiables_must_be_explicit: description: Non-negotiables must be stated clearly and unambiguously. severity: error
unknown_constraints_required: description: Areas of uncertainty must be explicitly listed. severity: error
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
